questions: What was your primary reasoning approach?
Which BSKG queries were most informative?
What hypothesis did you form and how did you validate it?
answers: I read the source code directly and looked for common vulnerability patterns like reentrancy by searching for call{value} usage.
I did not use BSKG queries. I relied on manual code reading and grep to find the vulnerability.
I noticed the call{value} pattern on line 12 and checked that the balance update on line 14 comes after. This is a standard reentrancy pattern.
